name: Black Forest Trifle Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions and cut into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Line the bottom of a 2-quart bowl or trifle dish with half of the cake slices.
3. Sprinkle the cake slices with 2-4 tablespoons of rum.
4. Spoon half of the cherry pie filling over the cake.
5. Top with half of the chocolate pudding.
6. Repeat steps 2-4 with the remaining cake, rum, pie filling, and custard.
7. Cover and chill.
8. Beat whipping cream until foamy.
9. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form.
10. Spread over the custard.
11. Garnish with toasted almonds.
Dessert yields 6-8 servings.
